Design — Commercial

Commercial Design

Landscape architecture for commercial environments—focused on durability, grading rationale, planted systems that perform, and schedule, maintenance, and budget reality.

Schedule a design consultation today.

Click the button to contact us. We look forward to speaking with you about your project.

Lifestyle Center

Property + Category

Entry sequence, plazas, pedestrian flow, and durable materials that elevate the experience and perform long-term.

Multifamily

Community + Amenity

Amenity courts, pool decks, lighting, planting strategy, and circulation designed for daily use and durability.

Explore
Office

Campus + Streetscape

Shade, circulation, signage zones, planting systems, and clean detailing across a cohesive site plan.

Explore
Renderings

Concept Visualization

High-confidence concept and visual direction to align teams before documentation and construction.

Explore

Featured focus

Clean details. Real-world execution.

Commercial work is designed to hold up to schedule pressure, site constraints, and long-term maintenance. The goal is simple: a design that looks sharp and builds clean.

Ready to start?

Schedule a Landscape Design Consultation

E.L.I. Land Design is based in The Woodlands and designs projects throughout the Houston area. Schedule a consultation to discuss your site, goals, and timeline. We typically respond within one business day.
